settings.html:
<style>

/* ================================================================
   MIDLAND FLOOR CARE — Homepage v=20260507-7
   Match live site block order. Polish + tighten sales.
   ================================================================ */

:root{
  --white: #FFFFFF;
  --mint:  #F3FCF4;
  --mint-2:#E6F7E8;
  --ink:   #0F1411;
  --ink-2: #4B5563;
  --line:  #E5EAE6;
  --green: #43A94B;
  --green-deep: #2F8137;
  --green-dark: #0E2F14;
  --gold:  #FACC15;
  --red:   #DC2525;
  --sans: "Manrope", system-ui, -apple-system, "Segoe UI", sans-serif;
}

*,*::before,*::after{ box-sizing:border-box }
html{ scroll-behavior:smooth }
body{
  margin:0;
  font-family: var(--sans);
  font-size: 18px;
  line-height: 1.6;
  color: var(--ink);
  background: var(--white);
  -webkit-font-smoothing: antialiased;
}
img{ max-width:100%; display:block; height:auto }
a{ color:inherit; text-decoration:none }
button{ font-family:inherit; cursor:pointer }
input, select, textarea{ font-family: inherit; font-size: 16px; }

h1, h2, h3, h4 { font-family: var(--sans); font-weight: 800; color: var(--ink); margin:0; letter-spacing:-.02em; line-height: 1.1; text-transform: capitalize; }
h1 { font-size: clamp(44px, 5.8vw, 72px); line-height: 1.04; }
h2 { font-size: clamp(32px, 3.8vw, 50px); }
h3 { font-size: 26px; }
h4 { font-size: 20px; }
p { margin: 0; }
.lede { font-size: 19px; line-height: 1.65; color: var(--ink-2); }
.eyebrow{ display:inline-block; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--green-deep); }

.wrap{ max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
.wrap-narrow{ max-width: 920px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 0 24px; }
section{ padding: 48px 0; background: var(--white); }
section.mint{ background: var(--mint); }
@media (max-width: 720px){ section{ padding: 44px 0; } .wrap, .wrap-narrow{ padding: 0 18px; } }

/* ---------- BTN ---------- */
.btn{
  display:inline-flex; align-items:center; justify-content: center; gap: 12px;
  font-weight: 800; font-size: 17px;
  padding: 20px 32px; border: 2px solid var(--green);
  background: var(--green); color: #FFF;
  border-radius: 4px;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .04em;
  transition: transform .12s ease, background .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease;
  line-height: 1; text-align: center;
}
.btn:hover{ background: var(--green-deep); border-color: var(--green-deep); transform: translateY(-1px); }
.btn--ghost{ background: transparent; color: #FFF; border-color: #FFF; }
.btn--ghost:hover{ background: #FFF; color: var(--ink); border-color: #FFF; }
.btn--ink{ background: var(--ink); border-color: var(--ink); color: #FFF; }
.btn--ink:hover{ background: #000; border-color: #000; }
.btn--lg{ padding: 22px 38px; font-size: 18px; }
.btn--xl{ padding: 26px 46px; font-size: 20px; }
.btn--block{ width: 100%; }

/* ---------- TOPBAR ---------- */
.topbar{
  background: var(--ink); color: #E5EAE6;
  font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500;
}
.topbar .inner{
  display:flex; justify-content:space-between; align-items:center;
  padding: 8px 24px; gap: 16px; flex-wrap: wrap;
  max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto;
}
.topbar .pill{
  display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap:8px;
  padding: 3px 10px; background: rgba(67,169,75,.18); color: #B7E5BD;
  border-radius: 999px; font-weight: 700; font-size: 11px;
  text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: .06em;
}
.topbar .pill::before{ content:""; width: 6px; height: 6px; background: var(--green); border-radius: 50%; animation: pulse 1.6s infinite; }
@keyframes pulse{ 0%{ box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(67,169,75,.6) } 70%{ box-shadow: 0 0 0 8px rgba(67,169,75,0) } 100%{ box-shadow: 0 0 0 0 rgba(67,169,75,0) } }
.topbar a{ color:#FFF; font-weight: 700; }

/* ---------- NAV ---------- */
header.nav{
  position: sticky; top: 0; z-index: 50;
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.97); backdrop-filter: saturate(140%) blur(8px);
  border-bottom: 1px solid var(--line);
}
header.nav .inner{
  display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content: space-between;
  max-width: 1200px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 12px 24px;
}
.logo img{ height: 60px; width: auto; display:block; }
nav.primary ul{ list-style: none; padding:0; margin:0; display:flex; gap: 24px; }
nav.primary a{
  font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: .08em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--ink);
}
nav.primary a:hover{ color: var(--green-deep); }
.nav-cta{ display:flex; gap: 12px; align-items:center; }
.nav-cta .phone{ font-weight: 800; font-size: 15px; color: var(--ink); }
@media (max-width: 900px){ nav.primary{ display:none } }
@media (max-width: 540px){ .nav-cta .phone{ display:none } }

/* ============== HERO — full-bleed photo with dark overlay ============== */
.hero{
  position: relative;
  background: var(--ink);
  color: #FFF;
  overflow: hidden;
  min-height: 580px;
  display: flex; align-items: center;
  padding: 80px 0;
}
.hero .bg{
  position: absolute; inset: 0; z-index: 0;
  background-image:
    linear-gradient(90deg, rgba(15,20,17,.94) 0%, rgba(15,20,17,.82) 40%, rgba(15,20,17,.45) 70%, rgba(15,20,17,.25) 100%),
    url('images/Midland%20Floors%20Hero%20image.jpg');
  background-size: cover; background-position: center right;
}
.hero .wrap{
  position: relative; z-index: 1;
  max-width: none; margin: 0;
  padding: 0 32px 0 64px;
}
.hero .wrap > * { max-width: 680px; }
@media (max-width: 720px){ .hero .wrap{ padding: 0 20px; } }
.hero .chip-row{
  display:flex; gap: 0; flex-wrap: wrap;
  font-size: 11px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase;
  color: var(--green); margin-bottom: 24px;
}
.hero .chip-row span{ position: relative; padding-right: 14px; margin-right: 14px; }
.hero .chip-row span:not(:last-child)::after{ content:"·"; position: absolute; right: 0; color: rgba(255,255,255,.4); }
.hero h1{ color: #FFF; max-width: 14ch; font-weight: 800; }
.hero p.sub{
  margin-top: 22px; font-size: 20px; line-height: 1.55;
  color: #D5DAD7; max-width: 56ch; font-weight: 500;
}
.hero p.sub b{ color: #FFF; font-weight: 800; }
.hero p.sub .urgent{ color: var(--green); font-weight: 800; }
.hero .ctas{ margin-top: 28px; display:flex; gap: 12px; flex-wrap: wrap; align-items: center; }
.hero .ctas .secondary{ font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; color: #B7BCB8; }
.hero .ctas .secondary u{ color: #FFF; }
.hero .reviews{
  margin-top: 28px; display:flex; gap: 18px; align-items: center; flex-wrap: wrap;
  font-size: 13px; color: #B7BCB8;
}
.hero .reviews .stars{ color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: .12em; font-size: 16px; }
.hero .reviews b{ color: #FFF; font-weight: 800; }

@media (max-width: 720px){
  .hero{ min-height: 0; padding: 56px 0 48px; }
  .hero .bg{ background-position: center; }
}

/* ============== SECTION HEADER (centered like live site) ============== */
.sect-head{ text-align: center; max-width: 720px; margin: 0 auto 24px; }
.sect-head h2{ margin-top: 10px; }
.sect-head p{ margin-top: 10px; }

/* ============== PROCESS (mint, 4 BIG animated circles) ============== */
.process-row{
  display: grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(4, 1fr); gap: 24px;
  position: relative; margin-top: 32px;
}
.process-step{
  text-align: center; position: relative;
  padding: 0 8px;
  background: transparent;
  border: 0;
  cursor: pointer;
  transition: transform .35s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1);
}
.process-step:hover{
  transform: translateY(-10px);
}
.process-step .circle-wrap{
  position: relative; width: 140px; height: 140px; margin: 0 auto 22px;
  z-index: 1;
}
.process-step .circle{
  width: 100%; height: 100%; border-radius: 50%;
  background: var(--white); border: 2px solid var(--green);
  display: grid; place-items: center;
  font-weight: 800; font-size: 14px; letter-spacing: .16em;
  color: var(--green-deep); text-transform: uppercase;
  box-shadow: 0 8px 20px -8px rgba(67,169,75,.25);
  transition: transform .4s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1), background .25s ease, color .25s ease, box-shadow .35s ease;
}
.process-step:hover .circle{
  background: var(--green); color: #FFF;
  transform: scale(1.08) rotate(-4deg);
  box-shadow: 0 16px 32px -8px rgba(67,169,75,.55);
}
.process-step .badge{
  position: absolute; top: -4px; right: -4px;
  width: 40px; height: 40px; background: var(--green); color: #FFF;
  border-radius: 50%; display:grid; place-items:center;
  font-size: 15px; font-weight: 800;
  box-shadow: 0 6px 12px -2px rgba(67,169,75,.5);
  border: 3px solid var(--white);
  transition: transform .35s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1), background .25s ease;
}
.process-step:hover .badge{
  transform: scale(1.15) rotate(8deg);
  background: var(--ink);
}
.process-step h4{ font-size: 19px; margin-bottom: 8px; font-weight: 800; }
.process-step p{ color: var(--ink-2); font-size: 14px; line-height: 1.55; max-width: 26ch; margin: 0 auto; }
/* connecting dotted line between cards */
.process-row::before{
  content:""; position: absolute; top: 130px; left: 14%; right: 14%; height: 2px;
  background-image: linear-gradient(to right, var(--green) 50%, transparent 50%);
  background-size: 12px 2px; background-repeat: repeat-x;
  z-index: 0; opacity: .35;
}
@media (max-width: 800px){
  .process-row{ grid-template-columns: repeat(2, 1fr); gap: 18px; }
  .process-row::before{ display: none; }
  .process-step{ padding: 24px 14px; }
  .process-step .circle-wrap{ width: 120px; height: 120px; }
}

/* ============== FLOORS AREN'T A SIDE JOB + FORM ============== */
.side-job{
  display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 56px; align-items: start;
}
.side-job .left h2{ font-size: clamp(28px, 3.6vw, 42px); }
.side-job .team-photo{
  margin-top: 20px; border-radius: 4px; overflow: hidden;
  border: 1px solid var(--line);
}
.side-job .team-photo img{ aspect-ratio: 5/4; object-fit: cover; width: 100%; }
.side-job .badges{
  display:flex; gap: 14px; flex-wrap: wrap; margin-top: 14px;
  font-size: 12px; color: var(--ink-2); font-weight: 700;
}
.side-job .badges span{ display:inline-flex; align-items:center; gap: 6px; }
.side-job .badges span::before{
  content:"✓"; width: 18px; height: 18px; background: var(--mint);
  color: var(--green-deep); display:grid; place-items:center; border-radius: 50%; font-weight: 800; font-size: 10px;
}

/* form — match live site exactly: simple, single column */
.form-card{
  background: var(--white); border: 1px solid var(--line); border-radius: 4px;
  padding: 28px;
}
.form-card h3{ font-size: 26px; margin-bottom: 4px; font-weight: 800; }
.form-card .sub{ font-size: 13px; color: var(--ink-2); margin-bottom: 18px; }
.form-card label{ display:block; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 800; color: var(--ink); margin-bottom: 6px; letter-spacing: .04em; text-transform: uppercase; }
.form-card .row{ margin-bottom: 14px; }
.form-card input, .form-card select{
  width: 100%; padding: 11px 14px;
  border: 1.5px solid var(--line); border-radius: 4px;
  background: var(--white); color: var(--ink);
  transition: border-color .15s ease, box-shadow .15s ease;
}
.form-card input:focus, .form-card select:focus{
  outline: none; border-color: var(--green); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(67,169,75,.15);
}
.form-card .radios{ display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap: 8px; margin-top: 4px; }
.form-card .radios label{ display:flex; align-items:center; gap: 10px; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; text-transform: none; letter-spacing: 0; cursor: pointer; }
.form-card .radios input{ width: auto; margin: 0; accent-color: var(--green); }
.form-card .help{ margin-top: 10px; font-size: 12px; color: var(--ink-2); line-height: 1.5; }
.form-card .alt{
  margin-top: 16px; padding-top: 16px; border-top: 1px solid var(--line);
  text-align:center; font-size: 13px; color: var(--ink-2);
}
.form-card .alt a{ font-weight: 800; color: var(--ink); display:block; margin-top: 4px; font-size: 22px; }
@media (max-width: 800px){ .side-job{ grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; } }

/* ============== ABOUT STRIP ============== */
.about-strip{ text-align:center; max-width: 760px; margin: 0 auto; }

/* ============== SERVICES (residential / commercial — photo + bullets) ============== */
.svc-block{ display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 32px; align-items: stretch; margin-top: 20px; }
.svc-block > div:not(.photo){ display:flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; }
.svc-block p.lede{ font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.55; color: var(--ink-2); }
.svc-block .btn{
  padding: 12px 20px; font-size: 13px;
  background: #FFFFFF; color: var(--green-deep);
  border-color: var(--green);
  align-self: flex-start;
}
.svc-block .btn:hover{
  background: var(--green); color: #FFFFFF; border-color: var(--green);
}
.svc-block .photo{
  position: relative;
  border-radius: 16px;
  overflow: hidden;
  background: var(--white);
  box-shadow:
    0 24px 48px -16px rgba(15,20,17,.18),
    0 8px 16px -8px rgba(67,169,75,.22),
    0 0 0 1px var(--line);
  display:flex;
  transition: transform .35s cubic-bezier(.2,.8,.2,1), box-shadow .35s ease;
}
.svc-block .photo:hover{
  transform: translateY(-4px);
  box-shadow:
    0 32px 56px -16px rgba(15,20,17,.22),
    0 12px 24px -8px rgba(67,169,75,.32),
    0 0 0 1px var(--green);
}
.svc-block .photo img{
  width:100%; height: 100%; min-height: 320px; object-fit: cover;
  display: block;
}
/* Brand corner mark — small green clover-leaf accent in top-left */
.svc-block .photo::before{
  content: "";
  position: absolute; top: 14px; left: 14px;
  width: 14px; height: 14px;
  background: var(--green);
  clip-path: polygon(50% 0%, 100% 50%, 50% 100%, 0% 50%);
  z-index: 2;
  box-shadow: 0 2px 6px rgba(67,169,75,.4);
}
.svc-block ul{ list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0 0 18px; display:grid; gap: 8px; }
.svc-block li{
  display:flex; gap: 10px; align-items: flex-start;
  font-size: 16px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--ink);
}
.svc-block li::before{
  content:"→"; color: var(--green); font-weight: 800;
  flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 18px; line-height: 1.4;
}
.svc-pull{
  font-style: italic; font-size: 15px; color: var(--ink-2);
  border-left: 3px solid var(--green); padding-left: 14px;
  margin-top: 12px; max-width: 50ch;
}
.svc-pull cite{ display:block; font-style: normal; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 700; color: var(--ink); margin-top: 6px; }
@media (max-width: 800px){ .svc-block{ grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 24px; } }

/* ============== STATS BAND (green) ============== */
.stats-band{
  position: relative;
  background: var(--green-dark);
  color: #FFF;
  padding: 36px 0;
}
.stats-band .inner{
  display:flex; justify-content: space-between; align-items: center;
  gap: 32px; flex-wrap: wrap;
}
.stats-band h3{ color: #FFF; font-size: clamp(22px, 2.8vw, 32px); margin: 0; max-width: 28ch; line-height: 1.2; }
.stats-band h3 .accent{ color: var(--green); }
.stats-band a.btn{ flex-shrink: 0; }
.stats-band .meta{ font-size: 11px; color: var(--green); font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: .18em; text-transform: uppercase; margin-bottom: 8px; }

/* ============== TESTIMONIALS (dark photo overlay) ============== */
.testi{
  background: var(--green-dark);
  color: #FFF;
}
.testi h2{ color: #FFF; }
.testi .sect-head p{ color: #B7BCB8; }
.testi-grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns: repeat(3, 1fr); gap: 18px; margin-top: 28px; }
.testi-card{
  background: rgba(255,255,255,.04); border: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.12);
  border-radius: 4px; padding: 22px;
  display:flex; flex-direction:column; gap: 14px;
  backdrop-filter: blur(4px);
}
.testi-card .stars{ color: var(--gold); letter-spacing: .12em; font-size: 16px; }
.testi-card blockquote{ margin: 0; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; color: #FFF; font-weight: 500; }
.testi-card .who{ display:flex; gap: 12px; align-items: center; padding-top: 12px; border-top: 1px solid rgba(255,255,255,.14); }
.testi-card .who .av{ width: 36px; height: 36px; border-radius: 50%; background: var(--green); color: #FFF; display: grid; place-items: center; font-weight: 800; flex-shrink: 0; font-size: 13px; }
.testi-card .who b{ display:block; font-size: 14px; color: #FFF; }
.testi-card .who span{ font-size: 11px; color: #B7BCB8; letter-spacing: .04em; }
@media (max-width: 800px){ .testi-grid{ grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

/* ============== FOOTER — single dark band, 4 columns ============== */
footer{ padding: 56px 0 24px; background: var(--ink); color: #B7BCB8; }
footer .grid{ display:grid; grid-template-columns: 1.4fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 32px; }
footer h5{ font-size: 13px; font-weight: 800; letter-spacing: .14em; text-transform: uppercase; color: var(--green); margin: 0 0 14px; }
footer .footer-logo{ display:inline-block; margin: 0 0 16px; }
footer .footer-logo img{ height: 64px; width: auto; display: block; filter: brightness(0) invert(1); }
footer p.brand-line{ color: #B7BCB8; font-size: 15px; line-height: 1.6; max-width: 36ch; margin: 0; }
footer ul{ list-style: none; padding: 0; margin: 0; }
footer li{ padding: 4px 0; font-size: 15px; }
footer a:hover{ color: var(--green); }
footer .socials{ display:flex; gap: 8px; margin-top: 14px; }
footer .socials a{
  width: 34px; height: 34px; border-radius: 50%; background: rgba(255,255,255,.08);
  display:grid; place-items:center; color: #FFF; font-weight: 800; font-size: 13px;
  transition: background .15s ease;
}
footer .socials a:hover{ background: var(--green); }
footer .meta{
  font-size: 12px; color: #6B7280;
  padding-top: 24px; margin-top: 28px;
  border-top: 1px solid #1F2A22;
  display:flex; justify-content: space-between; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 12px;
}
@media (max-width: 800px){ footer .grid{ grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; } }
@media (max-width: 500px){ footer .grid{ grid-template-columns: 1fr; } }

/* helpers */
.center{ text-align:center }
.mt-12{ margin-top:12px } .mt-18{ margin-top:18px } .mt-24{ margin-top:24px } .mt-32{ margin-top:32px }

.reveal{ opacity: 0; transform: translateY(8px); transition: opacity .45s ease, transform .45s ease; }
.reveal.in{ opacity: 1; transform: none; }
@media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){ .reveal{ opacity:1; transform:none; transition:none; } }

</style>

settings.title: Professional Floor & Carpet Care in DC, MD & VA.

settings.editor: Family-owned, locally operated. Trusted by DMV homeowners and facility managers for carpet cleaning, hardwood refinishing, tile & grout, upholstery, and full commercial floor care. Call for immediate availability.

settings.html: ★★★★★5.0 Google Rating · 774+ DMV ClientsFully Insured · COI on Demand

The Midland Process Explained

How our process works.

Our process makes it easy to see exactly how we deliver quality results and complete client satisfaction. Clear steps, no guesswork, and a smooth experience from first visit to final clean.

SITE
01

Walkthrough

We inspect the space in person, identify surfaces and trouble spots.

PLAN
02

Facility Score

You get a written assessment of every surface. Yours to keep.

QUOTE
03

24-48 Hour Quote

Line-item pricing, no hidden fees, no annual lock-ins.

CLEAN
04

Schedule

Nights, weekends, holidays. Your tenants only see the result.

Floors and Carpet Aren't a Side Job. They're the Whole Job.

Schedule a visit here.

Free site evaluation. No pressure, no obligation.

You'll be redirected to our pricing page along with an option to schedule a site visit.

Or call us right now: (240) 532-9097

settings.editor: Family-owned, serving DC, Maryland, and Virginia. From Bethesda homeowners pressing for family visits to Arlington property managers needing a 40K sq ft office cleaned overnight and same-play-book show-up on time, we do the work right and leave better than we found it.
"Carpet like new after 8 years of kids and pets." — Sandy, Bethesda

From Bethesda single-family homes to Tysons townhouses, Midland brings commercial-grade equipment and eco-friendly chemistry into your living room. Our crews show up on time, treat your home like their own, and leave behind carpet and floors that look like the day they were installed. Fast dry times, kid-safe and pet-safe products, and a guarantee in writing.
"40K sq ft office cleaned overnight. No downtime." — Arlington Property Manager

Built for facilities that can't shut down. Midland works nights, weekends, and holidays so your tenants and customers never see the disruption, only the result. COI-ready crews, EPA-registered chemistry, and one named DMV account lead on every visit. From a 40K sq ft Class A office to a single-suite federal contractor, we'll build a program around your floors, your hours, and your budget.

image.alt: Real Midland commercial office floor cleaning

FAQ

Questions DMV homeowners and facility managers ask first.

How fast can you get on-site? +
Most DMV clients get a site visit within 48 hours and a written quote 24-48 hours after. Same-day emergency dispatch. Call (240) 532-9097.
Are you insured and COI-ready? +
Yes. Fully insured. COI, W-9, and SDS sheets are emailed the same business day you ask.
Do you handle nights, weekends, and emergencies? +
Yes. Most commercial work happens nights, weekends, and holidays. Same-day emergency response is available. Call (240) 532-9097.
What's the difference vs. national chains? +
We're a local DMV flooring contractor, not a national franchise. One named account lead, custom programs, faster response, no annual lock-ins.

We serve the DMV metro with commercial floor care, hardwood floor cleaning, tile & grout cleaning, floor maintenance, wood floor refinishing, and EPA-approved disinfecting.
